title: macrolobium crassifolium
intro: Macrolobium crassifolium, also known as the 'butterfly tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Macrolobium crassifolium include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
